item.dc:creator: airwoman

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1207 (Ewok Celebration)
item.description:
In honor of America's newest and probably least problematic folk hero, here's some memes about them, and anti-capitalism in general. Let us seize the production of Our Bread.
For the record, if anyone wants to make for me a version of this sign in Sumerian Cunaeform to go with the "live, laugh, love" sign I already have in that language, you'd be my hero.
I heard this morning that his backpack contained monopoly money, this is fucking hilarious.
Pippin (and Alvin) tax. Today's message from Pippin: "Good boy! Good boy!"
TOTALLY JUST KIDDING HERE FEDS I LOVE THE BOOT OF CAPITALISM ON MY NECK.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: "Bruh, what is you doing?" -That Dog, Probably.
item.dc:creator: MayMyEnemiesLiveLong

item.title: Nobody Stood.
item.description: A white woman, race educator Jane Elliot, says to an auditorium full of people, "I want every white person in this room who would be happy to be treated as this society, in general, treats our citizens -- our Black citizens -- if you, as a white person, would be happy to receive the same treatment that Black citizens do in this society, please stand." Nobody stands. After repeating the instruction, she says, "You know why you aren't standing. You know it's ugly, you know it's happening, and you don't want it for you. I want to know why you're so willing allow it for others."
item.dc:creator: SenorWombat

item.title: It's just lines, bro.

item.title: I am very worried about Healthcare CEO's right now.
item.description:
Kim Keck (Blue Cross)
Erhardt Preitauer (CareSource)
Lisa Erickson (Medica)
Joseph Zubretsky (Molina)
Andrew Witty (United Health Group - UHG)
David Cordani (Cigna)
Mark Bertolini (Previous Aetna CEO, now Oscar CEO)
Jim Rechtin (Humana)
J. David Joyner (CVS) Specifically these ones. Please be very safe out there everyone!
item.dc:creator: AeonexAshaxei

item.title: 56% of an Oodle of Unmuted Faves
item.description:
https://www.instagram.com/shiadanni
https://www.instagram.com/bashtheentertainer
That's Imgurian @CocoCapitainePoulet, playing a beautiful piece he wrote himself. You know, as you do. Upvotes go here https://imgur.com/gallery/tune-i-wrote-this-unique-instrument-R9pMGhz and you can listen to the whole thing on his Youtube channel https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NevvyELGHl4
https://uselessfarm.com --- For more unmuted faves just click on the #oodles tag. --- PSA: I've pretty much spent my last two weeks on imgur reporting ad spam and could definitely use some more eyes & downvoting thumbs: https://imgur.com/gallery/constant-vigilance-usersub-constant-vigilance-lFEcRqc
item.dc:creator: ParallelParkingInABurka

item.title: Images of Note: Jenkem Jams
item.description:
mood
PISS WIZARD!
Mood
sup
HELL YEAH
FUCK YOU (pirates roms of out of print video games)
O<
It's the circle of life: Some guy gets called out for being a cunt and they get a Job on GB news.
P E E
Based Moleman?
Ah yes, the two genders. Femboy and war criminal.
*Throws that at a crowd and everyone gets Double Ds*
a baby!
Oh I am a fucking mess
If exploiting the poor for the benefit of the rich is so vital to America then what does that say about America?
OuO
Ragatha eating a borger on the roof
crnch crnch crnch crnch crnch crnch crnch crnch crnch crnch crnch crnch crnch crnch crnch
Amazing fit. Wish it was warm enough here to pull that of today
Violence
m o o s e
HELL YEAH
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky Job interview tomorrow. Amma disassociate :)
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Dump 2, electric thank you
item.description:
Hopefully this stays image #1
2
3 thanks to the couple of people that thumbed through pages of my book!!
4. Like really thanks, it gave me a good lift to not open the reports and see big fat ZEROS staring at me.
5
6
7. This movie is on the list of stuff to see with the Mrs. She never saw any of these but I need to find them with Spanish subtitles especially for a film like this.
8
9
10
11. I wanna see swedish scream down Gordon.
12
13
14
15 this guy is one of my faves
16
17 I have a friend that will not shut up about donating money to the RoboCop statue
18
19
20
21 turns out I didn't add tags to my first post cause it started as private.
22
23. Legendary photo
24
25 funny to think I've had this app for years and only used it to steal memes not post any
26 ACK ACK. ACK. ACK ACK!
27
28
29
30
31
32
33. I know it's terrible quality but boi do I love using this line.
34
35
36
37. It's a real pain to clock in and out as an employee too.
38. Mulan is my Disney princess, thank you very much. And no I will take no questions on Mulan 2, or Mulan the live action fanfic.
39. Abigail gets ahead by showing ankle. That's all. No respect.
40
41
42. Don't tell anyone this but the only reason I have ever pursued wine certifications was for the pins.
43.
44
45. Used to be me. Don't like the word list since NYT got it. They can't change my mind.
46. My friend blew his knee out so I needed to make and adjustment to this meme before sending it.
47
48
49. This is the same friend that won't shut up about RoboCop statue. Know I still love you even tho I'm ripping you, if you ever find this. Lol.
50. Big thanks again for the peeps that flipped through some pages. If you have any feedback on what you read as a wine person or not I'd love to hear!!
item.dc:creator: Mas1nsane
